name: Ripple
description: Rain rings widening over a dark pond — every redraw lands the drops again and sends each pair of ripples growing outward.

code.style: --d1: @rand(26%, 60%); --d2: @rand(64%, 96%); --o1: @rand(0.5, 1); --rule: ( /* both ripples of a drop share one emitted color */ --ring: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); @size: var(--d1); border: calc(30px / @Y) solid @var(--ring); border-radius: 50%; opacity: var(--o1); transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); @size: var(--d2); border: calc(16px / @Y) solid @var(--ring); border-radius: 50%; opacity: 0.45; transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
